description: Black Cobra is one of the largest immigrant street gangs in Denmark, founded in 2000 in Roskilde. With approximately 100 members, it operates in major Danish cities and has expanded into Sweden and Norway. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, robbery, extortion, and murder, and is known for its distinctive black and white shirts with a cobra emblem. It controls a youth gang called the Black Scorpions.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Black Cobra Gang currently operate in all Danish cities along with parts of Norway
country_links.context: The Black Cobra gang operates in parts of Norway.

country_links.evidence_quote: The gang is also active in Sweden , having established itself in the Malmö district Rosengård and the Stockholm suburbs of Tensta , Rissne and Rinkeby .
country_links.context: The Black Cobra gang is active in Sweden, having established itself in Malmö and Stockholm suburbs, and its members were arrested there for extortion and drug trafficking.
